title: ChallengerPlanAudit
description: Output schema for the Challenger adversarial plan reviewer. Validates plan quality, architecture safety, and risk coverage before implementation begins.

status.description: APPROVED: plan is safe to execute. NEEDS_REVISION: fixable issues found. REJECTED: fundamental flaws requiring replan. ABSTAIN: insufficient evidence to evaluate.

confidence.description: Confidence in the audit verdict. Below 0.7 triggers automatic ABSTAIN.

plan_path.description: Path to the plan artifact that was audited.

severity.description: CRITICAL: blocks execution. MAJOR: significant risk if unaddressed. MINOR: improvement suggestion.

executability_checklist.description: Cold-start executability audit results. For each of the first 3 tasks in the plan, simulate execution from the plan artifact alone (no prior context). A task PASSES if a fresh executor could complete it without additional clarification. FAILS if required inputs, file paths, commands, or acceptance criteria are missing or underspecified. If any task fails, overall executability is BLOCKED and should influence the verdict (at minimum a MAJOR finding).

checks_passed.description: Number of executability checks that passed for this task.

total_checks.description: Total number of executability checks evaluated for this task.

executable.description: True if all checks passed. False if any check failed — executor would be blocked.

first_blocker.description: Description of the first check that failed, explaining what is missing or underspecified. Omit if executable is true.

audit_scope.description: Records the focus areas requested by Atlas and the audit dimensions actually covered in this run.

requested_focus_areas.description: Focus areas passed by Atlas in the delegation payload. Empty array if Atlas used default full-audit scope.

covered_dimensions.description: Audit dimensions actually evaluated in this run (e.g. security, architecture, performance).

recommendation.description: Concise recommendation for Atlas: proceed, revise specific phases, or replan entirely.

scoring.description: Quantitative weighted scoring per SCORING-SPEC.md. Optional — omit when ABSTAIN or when scoring evidence is insufficient.

failure_classification.description: Required when status is NEEDS_REVISION or REJECTED. Note: 'transient' is not applicable for plan audits. fixable: addressable within existing phase structure. needs_replan: fundamental flaw requiring Prometheus redesign. escalate: destructive or ambiguous risk requiring human decision.
